thread_title: New in the game, struggling with teambuilding

content:
I'm not that experienced with corpo, but one of her big benefits (the weakness/vulnerability debuffs) only become available at e2 and e3, do factor that in. I assume you are going for the tulu rouse first and then discarding a lot for scaling. In that case, try Casiah instead to scale faster for a more aggressive approach. This team works at later stages, but I'm unsure what degree of investment is required to do so.

I'll @ somebody that plays this type of team in case they want to share something on the matter. <@113374123798859776>  (apologies redz for the unannounced ping)
thread_title: New in the game, struggling with teambuilding

content:
The way the Corpo/Miryam/GMurphy/Tulu works, is because Miryam doesn't care if the cards stay in hand or are discarded
With the combined draw power of Corpo and GMurphy (and possbily the posse too) it's not very difficult to get Miryam cards back to hand 
And while the rouse and 3 cost of Miryam (at E3) have prepare, the card cost is reduced either at end of turn if in hand or on discard 
The Sacraments (0 cost) produced by Miryam are only not that particularly important in hand by themselves and can be discard without worry too

content: HI, im a decently new player and was wondering who is it best to invest in considering my current awaker roaster, looking at the guide i was thinking on going for pollux E1 and mouchette E2 but would like to hear more opinions.
thread_title: Who to use my 3 prototype horizons on?

content:
I'm not experienced with Pollux, but afaik he wants e3 as a dps. Also consider pairing him with Saya (outside of the self evident Castor):

https://www.reddit.com/r/Morimens/s/X1uw59xRdj

Mouchette e2 is also a good idea. Just these two will take you months of dupes if we don't get reruns. But raising two dps is clearly focusing on dtide, so depending on how much you struggle with the story/your priorities, you might want to work on the supports you have on your main team instead.

Not counting permanents, if you wish to raise supports, consider:

- e1 horla. Weakness/Vuln on her strike and defense is a huge part of her toolkit. Can spook you on standard banner.

- e2/e3 Clementine. Allows Clementine to nuke hard and to apply huge modifiers on exalt. She gets a rerun soon.

- e1 Saya for big corrosion. Currently on banner

- e2 Thais for comboing hard thanks to further discounted card duping. Can spook you on standard banner.

- e3 Arachne for huge burst turn when she uses her exalt. Less important than the others.

If you're using Kath for main story, I would pay extra attention to the ultra supports I mentioned, since they are some of her best teammates and these breakpoints benefit her greatly.

embeds.title: Pollux propaganda
embeds.description: Never really tried E3 Pollux without my AA Castor before. Since Saya applied 2-3x Castor corrosion, I figured i gave it a try…

thread_title: Who to use my 3 prototype horizons on?

content: If you are unsure whether you need to focus on dtide or story more, determine how many of the rewards you want and what score you need to secure short term. Check the dtide/dzone section in Cheri's guide for more information

content: I am planning on getting saya E1 saya but since her banner has like 2 more months of runtime im not worried at all, same for horla but i think i will get her to E1 after building another team, getting clem and arachne dupes is kinda low on my priority as i use clem just for support and arachne is performing well at E2 for now
thread_title: Who to use my 3 prototype horizons on?

content:
you should seriously consider Clem e1 at least since her rerun is coming up. Starting with 5 symbiosis stacks is huge for mob encounters since it is a 15% dmg multiplier for the whole turn to all damage received (or given if you need to defend t1). Without it she feels slow. I've played Clem at all her enlightments below OE (and my main story team is Kath with ultra supports), and I assure you it is very noticeable.

Agreed with taking your time with Saya E1.

It's fine to wait for Horla, but do not underestimate how important a consistent Weak/Vuln source is. If she ever gets a rerun, please try to get her a copy. Disregard this if you're mainly pulling from the Ultra standard banner.

Agreed with Arachne.

Also, keep in mind that you can fit these supports into a second team easily for dtide (and you should do so anyway), so it's not like you're progressing exclusively one team

thread_title: Fairly new to the game and just want some guidance on what to do next

content:
this is what my main lineup looks like rn and was wondering if there are specific wheels i should be using and also how to invest into covenants or if i should just not worry about them for now
i just got enough for the set bonuses
thread_title: Fairly new to the game and just want some guidance on what to do next

content:
That team works more than fine, if you want you could swap Helot or Ryker (since Helot is there only for her exalt and Ryker is simply fine) for Saya or Faint (Saya brings corrosion, deck cycling and dupes of Mouch cards, while Faint brings DR). Nonetheless, it doesn't matter that much, and swapping your support  awakeners around based on what you're tackling is part of the fun.

Pulling for Vortice is obviously great, but in your situation it would either be to make a new dtide team or because you prefer her over Mouch. I personally think that this is reason enough, since she works at e1 (although she likes e3).

My advice (considering that pity rates are bad in the echo banners) is to pull Vortice e0 and get her to e1 through the monthly dupe in the shop at some point. Doesn't matter if it is now or in a couple months. You can beat alert 3 or 4 in dtide with a fairly starved team.

Tawil used to be a great dps because we were lacking in choices, and if you like her dps gameplay you can make her work if you very heavily invest in her. But her gameplay involves a lot of turtling and, overall, is very slow and not everyone's cup of tea. As a support, she really wants e2. Most people I've seen that use her as a support do so with Vortice, but Vortice has other possible team comps (she is quite flexible in this regard).

After securing a story comp (which you did imo) and a few dps for dtide (you can make a team out of mouch, vortice and saya/sanga for starters), everything else comes down to getting supports. Think what awakeners or teams you would like to bring to dtide, and then check what you need to improve said team.
thread_title: Fairly new to the game and just want some guidance on what to do next

content:
There are some supports that are more universal or better than others and, therefore, are recommended more often. If you are able, I would recommend you pull them next if able. Some of them are:

- Clementine (has her rerun on the 15th)
- Thais
- Horla (you have her e0, but she really likes e1)
- Arachne (shows up on the last echo banner, new character so it will take a while for her to rerun)
- Xu (current echo banner, core for poison teams if you want to go that route)

Finally, don't stress about missing units. There are no true limiteds in this game. At worst, you'll have to wait until anni to pull for a specific unit or a couple months to get to a specific enlightment. Make sure to have fun.
